# Todo App Template

A clean, simple task management app for tracking to-do items with lists, priorities, and completion status.

## What's included

- **Task list** — View all your tasks in an organized list
- **Add tasks** — Create new tasks with a title, description, and due date
- **Mark complete** — Check off tasks as you finish them
- **Priority levels** — Assign priority (low, medium, high) to tasks
- **Filter and search** — Find tasks quickly by name or status

## Data model

The template includes these data fields:

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| Title | Text | The task name |
| Description | Text | Optional details about the task |
| Due date | Date | When the task is due |
| Priority | Selection | Low, Medium, or High |
| Completed | Yes/No | Whether the task is done |

## Getting started

1. Go to **Templates** and select **Todo App**.
2. Click **Use Template** to create your project.
3. Try adding a few tasks in the preview to see how it works.
4. Customize it through chat — here are some ideas:

## Customization ideas

> "Add categories (Work, Personal, Shopping) and let me filter tasks by category."

> "Add a calendar view that shows tasks on their due dates."

> "Add color coding — red for overdue tasks, yellow for due today, and green for upcoming."

> "Add the ability to create multiple todo lists, like 'Work Tasks' and 'Home Tasks'."

> "Add a progress bar at the top showing what percentage of tasks are complete."

## Who this is for

- Anyone wanting to learn how Shogo works with a simple example
- Personal productivity tracking
- Small team task management
- Quick prototyping of task-based workflows
